data.title: Microservices
data.description: Spotify employs a microservices architecture enabling scalability and independent deployments.

data.title: Data Streaming
data.description: Utilizes distributed data streaming systems to handle high volume real-time data.

data.title: Hybrid Cloud Approach
data.description: Leverages both public and private clouds to optimize performance and cost.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: Uses CDNs to efficiently deliver music content to users globally.

data.title: High Availability Architecture
data.description: Built systems to ensure high availability and reliability.
